Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.06% today, the main contract closed at 844.5. The traders' willingness to ship is high.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is more.
